description: A villa romance under cypress light.
atmosphere: Tactile, slow, candlelit, and focused on intimacy over spectacle.

8:00.title: Bridal preparations
8:00.description: Champagne breakfast and quiet rituals at the villa.

14:00.title: Guest arrival
14:00.description: Aperitivo on the terrace, string trio playing.

16:00.title: Ceremony
16:00.description: Vows under a cypress arch at the water's edge.

18:30.title: Golden hour portraits
18:30.description: Couple shoots along the lakeside paths.

20:00.title: Dinner
20:00.description: Six-course tasting menu, candlelit long tables.

23:00.title: First dance & celebration
23:00.description: Live band, sparkler send-off at midnight.
